about:
# About OneStreamer

## What is OneStreamer?

OneStreamer is a unique streaming platform where only **one user can be live at a time**. Anyone can instantly take over the stream by pressing the "Take Over Stream" button, creating a chaotic battle for the spotlight. To stay live, streamers must captivate their audience with creative content while viewers earn points by watching, chatting, or streaming themselves. These points can be spent on strategic items to protect or attack streams, fun effects to enhance the experience, and chat gambling features—making every moment unpredictable and interactive.

## 🚧 Alpha Release

OneStreamer is currently in **early release alpha**. This means the platform is still undergoing active development and testing. You may encounter bugs, incomplete features, or unexpected behavior as we work to improve the experience.

**Found a bug?** Please help us out by using the **Bug Report** button to let us know what went wrong. Your feedback is invaluable in making OneStreamer better for everyone!

## 👥 Our Team

OneStreamer is built by a small, passionate team working hard to bring you something truly unique in the streaming world. We're constantly adding new features, fixing issues, and listening to our community.

**Love what we're building?** We'd greatly appreciate any support you can offer—whether that's spreading the word, providing feedback, or simply being part of our growing community. Every bit of support helps us continue developing this wild streaming experiment!

---

*Thank you for being part of the OneStreamer journey! *
support:
# 🛠️ Support & Bug Reports

## Encountered an Issue?

Since OneStreamer is in active development, you might run into bugs or unexpected behavior. We appreciate your help in making the platform better!

## 🐛 Report Bugs

**Found a bug?** Click the **red bug icon** 🔴 in the UI to file a bug report directly. This helps us track and fix issues quickly.

When reporting bugs, please include:
- What you were trying to do
- What actually happened
- Any error messages you saw

## 💬 Join Our Discord

For direct support, questions, or just to chat with the community, join our Discord server:

**🔗 [Join OneStreamer Discord](https://discord.com/invite/As5CA3ekYA)**

Our team and community members are active on Discord and can provide:
- Real-time assistance
- Feature discussions
- Community updates
- General troubleshooting

## Quick Help

**Can't find the bug report button?** Look for the red bug icon in the main interface.

**Discord link not working?** Try copying and pasting: `https://discord.com/invite/As5CA3ekYA`

---

*Thanks for helping us improve OneStreamer! 🚀*
tutorial:
# 📺 OneStreamer Tutorial
## 🎮 How It Works

OneStreamer is a platform where only **one user can be live at a time** 📹. Want to stream? You can take over the stream at any time by pressing the **🔴 "Take Over Stream"** button and then you'll become the streamer yourself.

Since anyone can go live and disrupt the stream at any time, you'll have to come up with novel and interesting ways to capture the audience's attention and not be booted offline.

## 💎 Earning Points

You can buy a variety of different items using **points** (💎). Points are earned as you:
- 👀 Watch the stream 
- 💬 Send messages in the chat
- 🎤 **Go live and stream** (fastest way!)

⚠️ *Note: only users who are registered and logged in can earn points and buy/use items.*

## 🏰 Strategic Items

The items that you can purchase using your points can be used to enhance or disrupt the stream! 

🛡️ **Guard Items:** Purchase Guard items to increase the global streaming cooldown timer ⏰ and prevent other users from taking over your stream. 

⚔️ **Attack Items:** Use Attack items as weapons to reduce the Global Cooldown timer while other streamers are live, speeding up their inevitable takeover ⚡.

## 🎊 Fun Stream Effects

You'll also find fun items that create effects on the stream:
- 🖍️ Draw on the streamer with **markers**
- 🍅 Throw a **tomato** at them  
- 🪩 Party under a **disco ball**
- 🌡️ Apply **thermal vision** filters
- 🙃 Flip the stream **upside down**

You can also trigger TTS and sound effects using specific items, such as the **📢 Megaphone** which enables TTS.

## 🎰 Chat Commands & Gambling

In addition, you can use your points to gamble in the chat 🎲. Type **!help** in the chat to see a full list of commands.

---

*Ready to join the chaos? The stream is waiting for someone bold enough to take it over!*
